text: Your vessel has been in collision and you are not sure if your vessel is sinking or not, How will you handle this situation?

options.text: Make sure that the lifeboat has as much fuel as possible and make your course for nearest land
Wait and see how the situation is developing
Search for missing person, continue to monitor the situation and prepare for event management in case it becomes necessary
Leave the vessel and stay not closer than 5 NM

explanation: In a potential sinking, the priority is to account for all personnel (search), maintain awareness of the ship's integrity (monitor), and prepare emergency systems (contingency).
